ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-13-2023 Continued To Jan-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Kurt D. Huysentruyt (attorney) to appear on January 08, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 per CCP 128 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Status hearing on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Barrett: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-30-2023 Continued To Nov-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt appeared via zoom for Stanley Corpus (petitioner).

Mr. Huysentruyt stated that the siblings have agreed to relocate and sell the property, that the house is now in the market, and that the sale of the property should be complete by the end of October. Status on close of estate is continued to November 13, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-31-2023 Continued To Aug-30-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Continued To Jul-31-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kurt D. Huysentruyt, for Stanley Corpus, Personal Representative.

Counsel advises that he spoke with Doris Corpus yesterday who advised that she has no objection to the extension of administration. Counsel reports that his client has agreed to move out of the Estate's real property with the intent to prepare it for sale and requests a continuance of six months to do so and that he intends to file a petition for final distribution once the sale has closed. The court notes that it doesn't have a proposed order for the instant petition. Counsel advises that he will deliver one to the court. The court instructs counsel to forward the proposed order via email to the assigned Examiner and counsel is provided with the email address. Counsel is advised that the court intends to extend administration for six (6) months to Jun-26-2023.

The subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.
